task_objective: Create a local deterministic helper that reads the active verification result and updates project and task state consistently so a verified PASS does not rely on manual state reconciliation.
completion_criteria: A local helper script exists that reads .cockpit/result/verification-result.json and updates the state files consistently.
The helper handles PASS without requiring manual state reconciliation.
The helper stays within the approved V1 scope and uses local deterministic logic.
Claude returns evidence in .cockpit/result/worker-result.md using the required format.

allowed: Update scripts/ for the deterministic helper.
Update .cockpit runtime files only as needed for the helper.
Update docs directly related to the helper or state-advance workflow.
Add or update a small validation or demonstration step if needed.
forbidden: Do not build UI or broader application code yet.
Do not add paid API dependencies.
Do not introduce broad orchestration or automation.
Do not change canonical project goals or verification verdicts.
Do not require the owner to manually restate or carry the worker instructions.

required_evidence: Confirmation that forbidden scope was not touched.
next_action: Run the deterministic state-advance helper task and capture the returned result file for verification.
